# Runtime Model

## Navigation

[[Home]] | [[Modules]] | [[API]] | [[Examples]] | [[Reference Games|Reference-Games]] | [[Lunasome]]

## Table of Contents

- [Startup](#startup)
- [Frame](#frame)

The runtime loads configuration, creates the Lua VM, registers `lurek.*`, then runs a fixed frame loop.

## Startup

1. The runtime locates the game folder and configuration.
2. It creates the isolated Lua environment.
3. It registers the `lurek.*` modules.
4. It calls `lurek.init`, then `lurek.ready` if they are defined.

## Frame

- `lurek.process(dt)` updates game logic.
- `lurek.process_physics(dt)` runs fixed-step physics logic.
- `lurek.draw()` queues world draw commands.
- `lurek.draw_ui()` queues HUD and UI draw commands above the world.
